description_long: This is a modern grave monument constructed primarily from polished gray and black granite. The structure features a rectangular base supporting a raised platform, which serves as the grave cover. At the head of the grave, there is a tall, vertical headstone with a sleek, minimalist design, accompanied by three upright granite slabs forming a stylized cross. The monument includes a secondary, lower slab adjacent to the main headstone, possibly for inscriptions or decorative purposes. The surfaces are smooth and reflective, with sharp, clean edges and a contemporary aesthetic. The overall design is solemn and dignified, suitable for a cemetery or memorial park.
description: A modern grave monument with a polished granite base, raised cover, and a tall, minimalist headstone featuring a stylized cross. The design is sleek, with smooth surfaces and contrasting gray and black stone.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the grave, the main headstone, and the stylized cross structure at the head.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the grave cover and the vertical alignment of the headstone and cross.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the headstone and the cross, with the layered granite slabs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side profile of the grave cover, the headstone, and the cross structure.
